metadata.name: x1safe_put_staking
metadata.description: X1SAFE-PUT Staking v2.0 - Multi-asset staking vault with flexible lock periods

instructions.name: close_user_position
docs: Close a stale user position (admin only — for layout migration resets)

accounts.name: user
docs: The user who owns the position — receives lamports back

instructions.name: close_vault
docs: Close vault state (admin only — testnet reset)

instructions.name: deposit
docs: Deposit supported tokens and mint X1SAFE-PUT

instructions.name: exit_vault
docs: Exit vault: burn X1SAFE-PUT, receive original asset, mint X1SAFE to reward pool

accounts.name: user_position
docs: User position — must be active and NOT withdrawn

accounts.name: vault_token_account
docs: Vault holds the deposited original tokens

accounts.name: user_token_account
docs: User receives original tokens here (minus fee)

accounts.name: dev_fee_account
docs: Dev wallet token account — receives 0.5% fee

accounts.name: x1safe_mint
docs: X1SAFE mint — minted 1:1 per PUT burned → reward pool

accounts.name: reward_pool_x1safe
docs: Staking reward pool — receives the minted X1SAFE (placeholder until C3)

instructions.name: init_supported_token
docs: Step 1: Initialize supported token metadata (without vault)

instructions.name: init_token_vault
docs: Step 2: Initialize token vault and activate supported token

accounts.name: token_vault
docs: Token vault (holds deposited tokens) - init via constraint

instructions.name: init_user_position
docs: Step A: Init user position before depositing

instructions.name: process_fees
docs: Process fee split: 60% to stakers, 20% buyback, 20% treasury

instructions.name: init_stake_account
docs: Pre-initialize stake account and vesting schedule (call once before first stake)

instructions.name: stake
docs: Stake X1SAFE-PUT to start earning rewards

instructions.name: withdraw
docs: Withdraw: burn X1SAFE-PUT → receive X1SAFE 1:1 directly (no original asset)
WARNING: permanently revokes Exit rights on this position

accounts.name: user_position
docs: User position — must be active and NOT already withdrawn

accounts.name: token_mint
docs: Token mint (needed for PDA derivation of user_position)

accounts.name: user_x1safe_account
docs: User's X1SAFE account — receives minted X1SAFE

errors.name: InvalidLockPeriod
errors.msg: Invalid lock period: must be between 1 and 360 days

errors.name: AlreadyWithdrawn
errors.msg: Position already withdrawn: exit rights permanently revoked

fields.name: reward_index_entry
docs: Reward index at entry (for calculating rewards)

fields.name: is_stable
docs: Whether this is a stablecoin (fixed 1:1 pricing)

fields.name: oracle
docs: Oracle address for price feed (if not stable)

types.name: UserPosition
docs: User position for a specific token

fields.name: token_mint
docs: Token mint this position is for

fields.name: x1safe_put_amount
docs: Amount of X1SAFE-PUT minted (represents USD value at deposit)

fields.name: deposit_value_usd
docs: USD value at deposit time (scaled by 1e6)

fields.name: has_withdrawn
docs: Whether user has withdrawn (burned PUT for X1SAFE, lost exit rights)

fields.name: authority
docs: Authority that can manage the vault

fields.name: usdc_mint
docs: USDC.X mint address for fee distribution

fields.name: total_tvl_usd
docs: Total value locked in USD (scaled by 1e6)

fields.name: claimed
docs: Whether this phase has been claimed

fields.name: total_amount
docs: Total X1SAFE amount to be vested
